content.claim: Diagnosis of special educational needs in Hungary is legally gatekept by expert committees (szakértői bizottságok) operating at county or district level, and parental consent is required to initiate investigation in all cases.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Political feasibility lens
limitations: This formal rule does not reveal actual implementation variance across regions
Degree of expert committee autonomy from political or fiscal incentives is not documented
Parental knowledge of or willingness to initiate referral processes is not measured
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
